tagline: Over 40 Years of Trusted Pool Care

hero.headline: 40 Years Keeping Pools Crystal Clear
hero.subheadline: For over four decades, families across Carefree, Cave Creek, and North Scottsdale have trusted us to keep their pools sparkling. Let our 40+ years of hands-on expertise give you a pool that is always swim-ready, so you can relax and just dive in.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Comprehensive Pool Care From<br class="hidden md:block"> a Team That Knows Arizona Pools
services.subtitle: From weekly cleaning to full renovations, our technicians bring over 40 years of combined experience to every job across the Carefree and North Scottsdale area.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Cleaning
cards.description: Thorough skimming, vacuuming, chemical balancing, and tile brushing every week. Your pool stays crystal clear and swim-ready through every Arizona season.

cards.title: Filter Cleaning & Service
cards.description: Professional filter teardown, cleaning, and reassembly for DE, cartridge, and sand filters. Keeps water circulating properly and extends equipment life.

cards.title: Equipment Repairs
cards.description: Expert diagnosis and repair of pumps, motors, heaters, salt systems, and filtration equipment. 40+ years of repair experience means fast, accurate fixes.

cards.title: Water Chemistry Management
cards.description: Precise chemical testing and balancing to keep water safe, clear, and gentle on skin. We prevent problems before they start with proactive chemistry care.

cards.title: Pool & Spa Renovations
cards.description: Complete renovation services from resurfacing and new tile to equipment upgrades and automation. Breathe new life into your backyard pool or spa.

cards.title: Seasonal Pool Prep
cards.description: Arizona pools need year-round attention. We handle monsoon prep, summer balancing, and winter care so your pool is always protected and ready to enjoy.

steps.title: Call or Request a Quote
steps.description: Tell us about your pool and we will provide a straightforward, honest quote. No pressure, no hidden fees, and no contracts to sign.

steps.title: We Take Care of Everything
steps.description: Our experienced technicians arrive on schedule every week. Cleaning, chemistry, equipment checks, all handled so you never have to think about it.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Crystal Clear Pool
steps.description: Your pool stays sparkling and swim-ready year round. With 40+ years behind us, we know exactly how to keep Arizona pools in perfect shape.

about.label: Why Homeowners Trust Us
about.headline: Family-Owned Since 1985, Serving Neighbors Like Family
about.description: Established in 1985 right here in the Carefree and Cave Creek community, we have spent over 40 years earning the trust of homeowners across a 350 square mile service area. Our service technicians bring over 40 years of combined experience, and our repair team adds another 40+ years of hands-on expertise. We are not a franchise or a faceless corporation. We are your neighbors who take pride in honest work and fair pricing.

features.title: Experienced, Skilled Technicians
features.description: Our service and repair teams each bring 40+ years of combined hands-on expertise to every pool we touch.

features.title: Honest Pricing, No Upsells
features.description: We quote fairly and never talk you into services you do not need. What we quote is what you pay, period.

features.title: Reliable, On-Time Every Week
features.description: Consistent scheduling you can count on. We show up when we say we will, week after week, year after year.

pricing.headline: Fair Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Straightforward pool care plans with honest pricing. No contracts, no hidden fees, just quality service you can count on.

guarantee.headline: Our Crystal Clear Promise
guarantee.description: If you are not completely satisfied with any service visit, call us and we will come back and make it right at no extra charge. After 40 years in business, our reputation means everything to us, and we stand behind every visit until your pool is perfect.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start servicing my pool?
faqs.answer: Most new customers are added to our route within one week. Just give us a call at (480) 488-2636 and we will schedule your free inspection at a time that works for you.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We cover Carefree, Cave Creek, North Scottsdale, and surrounding communities within a 350 square mile range. We have been serving this specific area since 1985 and know the local conditions inside and out.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home when you service my pool?
faqs.answer: Not at all. Most of our customers provide gate access and we handle everything while you are away. You will always know exactly what was done at each visit.

faqs.question: Will you try to upsell me on things I do not need?
faqs.answer: Absolutely not. Our customers consistently praise us for honest, fair pricing. We only recommend what your pool genuinely needs, nothing more. That is how we have kept customers for decades.

faqs.question: Can you repair my pool equipment?
faqs.answer: Yes. Our repair technicians have over 40 years of combined experience with pumps, motors, heaters, filters, and salt systems. Most repairs are diagnosed and completed quickly so your pool is back up and running fast.

testimonials.name: Leonel U.
testimonials.text: Great service! On time every week, courteous service, friendly staff and, above all, maintain the pool free of algae and other problems. We have had this service for about two years now and the pool has never looked and felt so good.

testimonials.name: Satisfied Customer
testimonials.text: Crystal Clear Pools did a fantastic job on my pools. I would recommend them to everyone I know. Professional, reliable, and the results speak for themselves.

testimonials.name: Angi Reviewer
testimonials.text: The price was less than others interviewed, and they do a good job without trying to talk you into things you don't need. Honest and dependable, exactly what you want in a pool service.

benefits: Free pool inspection with every quote
